name: Stir Fry of Broccoli & Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Skinned and Boned Chicken Breasts, Trimmed
6 cups Broccoli Florets (From about 2 lbs Broccoli)
2 large Red OR Green Peppers, Quartered lengthwise and cut cross-wise into 1/8 inch wide strips
1 large Onion, Halved lengthwise and cut into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts between waxed paper to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Wrap each chicken breast separately in plastic wrap and freeze until firm but not solid.
2. Cut the chicken crosswise into 1/8 inch wide strips.
3. Cover broccoli with cold water in a medium bowl.
4. Coat a heavy skillet with vegetable spray.
5. Add olive oil to the skillet and heat over high heat for 1 minute.
6. Add red peppers (or green), onion, garlic, basil, thyme, pepper, and rosemary to the pan. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
7. Drain the broccoli, but do not shake off the excess water. Add it to the skillet. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and steam for 2 minutes.
9. Stir in the chicken. Cover and steam until the chicken is almost cooked through, about 1 minute.
10. Uncover and increase heat. Stir fry until liquid reduces slightly, about 1 minute.
11. Divide among heated plates. Top each portion with 1 tbsp Parmesan.
